# ProviderAtlas — Full Documentation

> Texas Healthcare Provider Intelligence Platform

## Overview

ProviderAtlas aggregates public healthcare data for 280,000+ Texas providers into a single searchable platform. It cross-references five federal data sources to give researchers, compliance officers, medical sales professionals, and journalists a complete picture of any healthcare provider's practice, payments, and prescribing patterns.

## Data Sources & Coverage

### NPI Registry (NPPES)
- Source: CMS National Plan & Provider Enumeration System
- Coverage: All active Texas providers (individual + organization)
- Fields: NPI, name, credentials, specialty, practice address, phone, fax, entity type, enumeration date
- Updated: Daily via automated sync

### Open Payments
- Source: CMS Open Payments (Sunshine Act)
- Coverage: 587,000+ payment records from pharma and device manufacturers to Texas providers
- Fields: Payer name, payment amount, date, nature of payment, form of payment, program year
- Updated: Annually when CMS releases new data

### Medicare Utilization
- Source: Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners by Provider and Service
- Coverage: 277,000+ service records
- Fields: HCPCS code, procedure description, total beneficiaries, total services, total Medicare payment
- Updated: Annually

### Medicare Part D Prescribers
- Source: Medicare Part D Prescribers by Provider and Drug
- Coverage: 718,000+ prescriber records
- Fields: Brand name, generic name, total claims, total drug cost, total beneficiaries
- Updated: Annually

### MIPS Performance Scores
- Source: Quality Payment Program
- Fields: Final score, quality score, promoting interoperability score, improvement activities score, cost score, program year
- Updated: Annually

## URL Structure

### Static Pages
- / — Homepage with search, stats, top specialties
- /providers — Full-text search with filters (specialty, city, ZIP, name, Medicare acceptance)
- /specialties — Directory of all tracked medical specialties with provider counts
- /cities — Top 50 Texas cities by provider count
- /new-providers — Recently registered providers
- /data — Pre-built CSV datasets for purchase
- /pricing — Subscription tier comparison

### Dynamic Pages (Programmatic SEO)
- /provider/{npi} — Provider profile page. NPI is a 10-digit number (e.g., /provider/1234567890)
- /payments/{npi} — Full pharma payment breakdown by company and year
- /providers/{specialty} — All providers for a given specialty (URL-encoded lowercase, e.g., /providers/internal%20medicine)
- /providers/{specialty}/{city} — Providers by specialty and city
- /cities/{city} — All providers in a city (lowercase, e.g., /cities/houston)
- /zip/{zip} — Providers by ZIP code (e.g., /zip/77002)

### Authenticated Pages
- /dashboard — User dashboard (saved searches, alerts, billing)
- /auth/sign-in — Authentication via Neon Auth (Google/GitHub OAuth)

## Data Model

### Provider Profile (/provider/{npi})
Each provider page shows:
1. Header: Name, credentials, specialty, location, payment heat badge
2. Contact info (Pro only): Phone, fax
3. Medicare Activity: Total patients, services, Medicare payments; top procedures table (Pro only)
4. MIPS Performance: Final score (free), category breakdown (Pro only)
5. Prescribing Activity: Total prescriptions, drug cost, patients; top 3 drugs (free), full list (Pro only)
6. Open Payments: Total received, company count; full breakdown with bar chart and transaction table (Pro only)
7. Sidebar: NPI, entity type, gender, registration date, address
8. Related providers in same city

### Payment Page (/payments/{npi})
Detailed pharma payment transparency:
1. Summary: Total amount, transaction count
2. Payments by company: Aggregated by payer with totals
3. Payments by year: Annual breakdown
4. All transactions: Complete list with date, company, nature, amount

## Free vs Pro Access

### Free Tier
- Browse all providers and pages
- Provider summary stats (Medicare totals, prescriber totals, payment totals)
- Top 3 prescribed drugs
- MIPS final score
- Search with 3-page pagination limit

### Pro Tier ($29/month)
- Full Medicare procedure data tables
- Complete prescribing data (all drugs)
- Full payment breakdowns (bar charts, transaction tables)
- MIPS category score breakdown
- Contact information (phone, fax)
- Unlimited search pagination
- CSV exports
- Saved searches and email alerts

## Technical Stack
- Next.js 15+ (App Router, TypeScript)
- Neon Postgres (database)
- Neon Auth (authentication)
- Stripe (subscriptions)
- Deployed on Vercel
